name: Verre Magic: Transformation
desc:
This card is always treated as a “Witchcrafter” and “Magistus” card.
Activate 1 of these effects;
● Return 1 “Rilliona” monster you control to the Deck or Extra Deck, then Special Summon 1 “Witchcrafter Madame Verre” from your hand or Deck, then you can add 1 “Witchcrafter” Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand, or Set it.
● Return 1 “Witchcrafter Madame Verre” you control to the Deck, then Special Summon 1 “Rilliona, the Magistus of Verre” and 1 Level 4 Spellcaster monster from your hand and/or Deck.
You can only activate 1 “Verre Magic: Transformation” per turn.
